summary: Complete testing of beneficiary invitation flow and enhanced demographic fields. Fixed critical bug: create_jwt_token was undefined (should be create_token). All features working correctly.

Navigate to /beneficiaries - shows beneficiary cards with correct statuses ✓

Form has Personal Information section (First/Middle/Last Name, Suffix, Relationship, Gender, DOB) ✓

Form has Address section (Street, City, State dropdown, ZIP) ✓
Form has Additional Information section (SSN last 4, Notes) ✓
Create beneficiary with all demographic fields - saves correctly ✓
Send Invite button - updates status to 'sent', shows toast notification ✓

context_for_next_testing_agent: Beneficiary invitation flow is fully functional. Enhanced demographic fields (first_name, middle_name, last_name, suffix, gender, DOB, address fields, ssn_last_four, notes) are all working. Invitation statuses: pending -> sent -> accepted.
